name: hopper
description: Thin plugin layer over the llm-hopper file-based protocol. Dispatches task-typed work to vendor CLI subprocesses (codex, kimi, opencode, copilot, agy, grok, mimo, claude). No harness reaction core; vendor CLIs bring their own runtime. State lives in plain markdown under .hopper/. See https://github.com/surebeli/hopper-plugin.
